title: Sioux Falls, SD — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Sioux Falls is a city in SD with a population of 192,517. No state income tax, booming economy, and the falls of the Big Sioux River.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
